figures.caption: Figure 1: The proposed framework combines regular data collection from in-the-wild data Ditw 𝑡 via fact-check article retrieval and generator-driven data Dgen 𝑡 within a continual learning pipeline to adapt detectors 𝑓𝜃 .

Table 2: Comparison of all detectors across benchmark datasets. Each entry reports AUC / ACC (%). For each dataset and each metric, the best result is highlighted in bold, while the second best is underlined.

Figure 8: ACC on AIGenImages2026 across generators under continual learning. Results show consistent improvements across tasks, demonstrating effective adaptation while mitigating catastrophic forgetting.

Figure 2: Fact-check retrieval pipeline: Given an article 𝑎, an LLM G extracts textual descriptions C referring to AI-generated images mentioned in 𝑎, along with a set of candidate images Icand. A VLMV identifies anchor images Ianchor that are semantically aligned with C, and a similarity function based on an image encoder 𝑓img further expands this set to Isim.
Table 1: Overview of the AIGenImages2026 dataset.
